name: Cryptocurrency Mining Traffic
notes: This rule triggers when cryptocurrency mining traffic is detected. This could indicate a machine communicating with a cryptocurrency mining pool.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Ports in any order from the same source IP from the previous sequence
conditions_text: when a subset of at least 1 of these Cryptocurrency Mining Command Execution, Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash, Cryptocurrency Mining Process, Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name, In-Browser Cryptojacking - Javascript File Hash, In-Browser Cryptojacking - Javascript Filename, in any order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Ports in any order from the same source IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
thresholds: when a subset of at least 1 of these Cryptocurrency Mining Command Execution, Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash, Cryptocurrency Mining Process, Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name, In-Browser Cryptojacking - Javascript File Hash, In-Browser Cryptojacking - Javascript Filename, in any order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Ports in any order from the same source IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Cryptocurrency Mining Traffic on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when a subset of at least 1 of these Cryptocurrency Mining Command Execution, Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash, Cryptocurrency Mining Process, Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Name, In-Browser Cryptojacking - Javascript File Hash, In-Browser Cryptojacking - Javascript Filename, in any order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Ports in any order from the same source IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
RED_list: Event description: Cryptocurrency mining traffic has been detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
